get https://api.example.com/customers

Fetch a customer list.

Customers

  • Get Customersget

            
await fetch("https://api.example.com/customers", {

        

        

            
  method: "GET"

        

        

            
  headers: {

        

        

            
    "accept": "application/json"

        

        

            
  },

        

        

            
  body: JSON.stringify({

        

        

            
    "limit": 20

        

        

            
  })

        

        

            
})
Response
application/json

                
{

        

        

            
  "data": {

        

        

            
    "id": "cus_123"

        

        

            
  }

        

        

            
}
